top3.sql:
SELECT birthday
FROM Player
WHERE player_api_id = (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes
    ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT birthday
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.overall_rating = (
    SELECT MAX(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
)

SELECT birthday
FROM Player
WHERE player_api_id = (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes
    ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT birthday
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.overall_rating = (
    SELECT MAX(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
)

SELECT birthday
FROM Player p
JOIN (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes
    ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
    LIMIT 1
) top_player ON p.player_api_id = top_player.player_api_id;

final.sql:
SELECT birthday
FROM Player
WHERE player_api_id = (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes
    ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
    LIMIT 1
);
